biography: Myha'la Jael Herrold (/maɪˈhɑːlə/; born April 6, 1996) is an American actress, known mononymously as Myha'la. She is known for her role as Harper Stern in the British television drama Industry and her role as Jordan in the comedic horror film Bodies Bodies Bodies. She acted primarily in theater roles before being cast in Industry, including on the Broadway production of The Book of Mormon.
name: Myha'la
